summary: Reconcile Q4 truck stop atlas with Airtable ratings
description: Compare corporate atlas truck stop list against Airtable Truck Stop Ratings base. Flag any stops missing from atlas or rated below 2 stars.

summary: Pull fleet stop utilization data for winter corridors
description: Extract monthly driver count and incident data for I-65 I-20 I-75 I-40 corridor stops from Fleet Stop Log for Oct-Dec 2026.

summary: Update route notes for I-40 Birmingham-Little Rock winter hazards
description: Add winter-specific hazard notes to I-40 corridor route record including construction zone near Oxford AL.

summary: Compile winter corridor safety review brief
description: Prepare comprehensive safety review brief covering I-65 I-20 I-75 I-40 corridors for Feb 5 2027 leadership meeting. Include incident trends stop ratings and policy recommendations.

summary: Analyze 2026 incident trends across four corridors
description: Review PagerDuty incident data and fleet stop log incident tags to identify patterns across I-65 I-20 I-75 I-40 for 2026.

summary: Flag independent truck stops with safety concerns
description: Review all independent non-chain truck stops in Airtable and flag any with rating below 2 or security incidents in fleet stop log.

summary: Safety bulletin SB-2026-014 still referenced in HOS guide
description: Confluence HOS Compliance Guide PG-003 still links to superseded bulletin SB-2026-014. Should reference SB-2026-022 instead.

summary: Review driver policy wiki pages for winter protocol updates
description: Audit all DPW space pages for accuracy. Ensure winter driving safety protocol PG-006 reflects current chain-up requirements and corridor procedures.

summary: Fleet tablet cold-start reboot loop on firmware v4.1
description: Lenovo Tab M10 units entering reboot loop when powered on in temperatures below 25F. Firmware v4.2 patch partially addresses but reports of continued failures from drivers in northern corridors.

summary: HOS clock session token expires during rest period
description: ELD session token timing out during 10-hour rest periods causing drivers to re-authenticate on restart. Four PagerDuty incidents logged. Patches in v4.1 and v4.2 did not fully resolve.

summary: Prepare tablet reliability report for safety review
description: Compile tablet failure rates cold-start incidents and firmware patch timeline for inclusion in Feb 5 winter corridor safety review brief.

summary: Deploy firmware v4.2.1 hotfix to northern corridor tablets
description: Push v4.2.1 cold-start fix to all Lenovo Tab M10 units assigned to I-65 north and I-75 routes. Coordinate with drivers for overnight update window.

summary: Draft agenda for Feb 5 leadership meeting
description: Create structured agenda for winter corridor safety review meeting with Mike Hensley. Include time blocks for each corridor data review and recommendation discussion.

summary: Collect driver feedback on corridor stop conditions
description: Gather informal feedback from drivers on winter conditions at corridor truck stops. Focus on parking availability lighting and overnight safety concerns.

summary: Review safety training completion rates for driver reps
description: Pull Google Classroom completion data for winter driving and HOS refresher courses. Identify reps with overdue or incomplete training modules.

summary: Verify fuel stop contracts for I-75 corridor
description: Confirm vendor contracts are current for all chain fuel stops on I-75 corridor. Check for any rate changes effective Q1 2027.
Create one summary slide per corridor showing 2026 incident counts by category month-over-month trend and top 3 flagged stops.

summary: Coordinate with Rosa on updated independent lot policy language
description: Work with Rosa Campos to finalize updated language for Independent Truck Stop Safety Policy PG-005 based on 2026 incident data and driver feedback.
